steps.summary: Opened docs/horizons/accountant-feedback-incorporation.md, docs/plans/2026-07-05-accountant-feedback-incorporation.md, and phases/accountant-feedback-incorporation with AF1~AF4. ROADMAP/OBJECTIVE were moved to active accountant-feedback-incorporation.

Added kifrs/feedback/incorporation.py and tests/test_feedback_incorporation.py. The planner converts queue records into create_eval_seed, create_backlog_item, record_no_action, add_review_question, and update_review_pack_checklist actions with severity-based priority. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_feedback_incorporation.py -q -> 5 passed with existing pytest cache warning.

Added scripts/feedback_incorporation_report.py and generated docs/reports/2026-07-05-af3-feedback-incorporation-report.md plus docs/reports/field-feedback/2026-07-05-incorporated-review-questions.md from the real-transaction-poc feedback queue.

Closed accountant-feedback-incorporation with docs/reports/2026-07-05-af4-accountant-feedback-incorporation-close-report.md. Focused tests passed 12, incorporation reports regenerated, quality_preflight ok/public_safe True, and git diff --check produced only LF->CRLF warnings.
